title: Deluxe Paws Christmas Elf Plush Dangly Festive Soft Toy - 40cm
features: Superb dangly elf with beautiful embroidered features
Meets all Britsih and EU safety standards
UK company - designed in the UK
Super Soft and filled with RPet recycled filling
description: Product Description Adorable festive decoration Standing at 22cm tall, this plush elf brings a festive elegance to any space. Whether perched on a shelf, adorning your Christmas tree, or sitting by the fireplace, its presence radiates joy and festivities. It's also perfectly size for hugging and play! Perfect for play During the holiday season, this Dangly Elf Plush Toy can be involved in festive, fun activities such as 'Elf on the Shelf' tradition. Children can move the elf to different spots each day, encouraging them to search for its new hiding place and adding even more excitement to Christmas! Crafted from high-quality, 100% recycled materials Its soft, huggable body is designed for snuggles and comfort, ensuring it becomes an instant favorite among both children and adults - making this a perfect gift for all ages!
